title: Registration Page with In-Game Name & Player ID fields, wired to Join Now button

requirements.text: Update the RegistrationPage at '/registration' to include exactly two required input fields — 'In-Game Name' and 'Player ID' — along with a 'Proceed to Payment' button. The page must read match context (game mode, entry fee, prize pool) from sessionStorage (set by MatchCard on navigation) and display those details at the top of the form. All styling must follow the existing dark neon-red gaming theme (dark card background, neon red accents, Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts, neon glow on the button). A back-navigation option must be present to return to the Home screen.

quotes: On the Registration page, add input fields for: In-Game Name, Player ID,

acceptanceCriteria: The '/registration' route renders the RegistrationPage component with 'In-Game Name' and 'Player ID' input fields.
Both fields are required — the 'Proceed to Payment' button is disabled or shows a validation error if either field is empty.
Match context (game mode, entry fee, prize pool) read from sessionStorage is displayed on the page.
Page uses the existing dark neon-red theme with Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts and neon glow on the button.
A back navigation link/button returns the user to the Home screen ('/').

requirements.text: Ensure that clicking the 'Join Now' button on any MatchCard (both live backend cards and the 3 static fallback cards in MatchList) stores the match's game mode, entry fee, and prize pool in sessionStorage and navigates to '/registration'. This must work consistently for all cards regardless of data source.

quotes: When I click the 'Join' button on any match, it should open this page.

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Join Now' on any live backend match card saves match context to sessionStorage and navigates to '/registration'.
Clicking 'Join Now' on any of the 3 static fallback cards (Bermuda Solo, Bermuda Duo, Purgatory Solo) also saves match context to sessionStorage and navigates to '/registration'.
After navigation, the RegistrationPage correctly reads and displays the match context stored in sessionStorage.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ (useActor.ts, useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, main.tsx, or any path under frontend/src/components/ui).
No backend changes required — all changes are frontend only.
Do not introduce any new payment gateway integrations.
nonGoals: Adding a 'WhatsApp Number' field (not mentioned in this request).
Changing the UPI payment screen or ConfirmationModal.
Changing the TournamentBanner or Header components.
